description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 25 hrs 13 mins of coding time, averaging 2 hrs 50 mins per day. His WakaTime activity was mostly Java, with additional time in Markdown and other languages. The data shows activity across 5 projects.
